rag_rules: Place generated AGREE annex blocks in the target component implementation scope after subcomponents and connections
Use only visible identifiers in generated contracts to maintain component type independence
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting annexes in valid scopes
Use component type annexes for assumptions and guarantees, implementation annexes for bindings
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations and comparisons
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contracts
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not compare opaque data ports with numeric values
Do not use implementation-only identifiers in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
